_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: 2-fold more Iba1-positive cells in the optic nerves of Cx3cr1+/GFP mice compared to WT controls
details: At 6 weeks of age showed 2-fold more Iba1-positive cells in optic nerves compared to WT controls, similar to Nf1+/- mice
